# Alexxmarketing — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Alexxmarketing is a marketing agency focused on delivering marketing solutions. The brand identity and specific services are yet to be defined, but the name suggests a personalized, founder-led agency approach.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Alexxmarketing is a digital marketing advertising agency that transforms clicks into customers. Get custom web marketing strategies built around your goals. Let&#39;s scale your business.

### Services
https://example.com/services
Explore full-service digital marketing and advertising agency solutions that drive real ROI. From paid ads to SEO, we build campaigns that perform. See what we offer.

### About
https://example.com/about
Discover the story behind Alexxmarketing, a hands-on web marketing agency where your goals come first. Learn why our personalized approach beats big-box agencies every time.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready to grow? Contact Alexxmarketing, the advertising agency internet marketing pros trust for custom strategies. Fill out the form and let&#39;s build something great together.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com/contact
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Alexxmarketing
Alexxmarketing is a marketing agency focused on delivering marketing solutions. The brand identity and specific services are yet to be defined, but the name suggests a personalized, founder-led agency approach.

## Target Audience
- Digital Startups
- Local Business Owners
- E-commerce Brands

## Industry
Marketing & Advertising
